What you will learn in this Privacy Notice:

- Which data Zalando stores. - What we do with this data and what it is needed for.
- Which data protection rights and options you have .
- Which technologies and data we use for advertising, including the tracking technologies we use.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: The following generally applies: If we request that you share particular personal information with us, you may of course refuse to do this.
embed_text: This procedure is referred to as anonymisation. The following generally applies: If we request that you share particular personal information with us, you may of course refuse to do this. You can decide which information you share with us.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: If particular information is required in connection with a service (mandatory information), we will inform you by marking it accordingly.
embed_text:
For example, you cannot have a package delivered without giving a delivery address. If particular information is required in connection with a service (mandatory information), we will inform you by marking it accordingly. 1.1 Profile information

Profile information is personal and demographic information on your person (so-called master data), along with your individual interests, which you share with us when registering for Brand Hub.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: If you are logged into Brand Hub, you can view your personal data there and can usually edit it directly there, e.g. in order to update your email address after a move.
embed_text:
Tip If you are logged into Brand Hub, you can view your personal data there and can usually edit it directly there, e.g. in order to update your email address after a move. 1.2 Contact details

If you contact us, we collect your data.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text:
1.3 Messages, conversation content

If you communicate with us or other users regarding products (e.g. product evaluations) and other topics by phone, post, social media, contact forms or any other medium, we collect the content of your messages.
embed_text:
Depending on how you contact us (e.g. by phone or by email), your contact details may include your name, postal addresses, telephone numbers, fax numbers, email addresses, detail on your social network profiles (for example we receive your Facebook ID if you contact us via Facebook), user names and similar contact details. 1.3 Messages, conversation content

If you communicate with us or other users regarding products (e.g. product evaluations) and other topics by phone, post, social media, contact forms or any other medium, we collect the content of your messages. We may forward your messages to the office responsible for your concerns, perhaps to partner companies or manufacturers.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: If your messages are forwarded to another company (e.g. if you provide us with feedback on the manufacturer of a product), you of course have the option to tell us that the data should only be used by Zalando.
embed_text: We may forward your messages to the office responsible for your concerns, perhaps to partner companies or manufacturers. If your messages are forwarded to another company (e.g. if you provide us with feedback on the manufacturer of a product), you of course have the option to tell us that the data should only be used by Zalando. If so, we will not forward your information to the responsible office, or will only do so without your personal information, provided that your concerns can be processed in this way.

section: 1. Which data does Zalando process?
text: If so, we will not forward your information to the responsible office, or will only do so without your personal information, provided that your concerns can be processed in this way.

If you transmit messages to us for other users via functions provided for this purpose (e.g. product evaluations), we may publish these within the scope of our services.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text:
Which data protection rights do I have?


2.1 Provision of online services

We process your data in the necessary scope to fulfil contracts and to provide and execute further services requested by you, as described in this Privacy Notice.
embed_text:
You can find further information under 7. Which data protection rights do I have?


2.1 Provision of online services

We process your data in the necessary scope to fulfil contracts and to provide and execute further services requested by you, as described in this Privacy Notice. The purposes of the necessary data processing therefore depend on the purpose of the contract agreed with you (including our General Terms and Conditions and any service-specific terms and conditions or terms of use) or services requested by you.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: The purposes of the necessary data processing therefore depend on the purpose of the contract agreed with you (including our General Terms and Conditions and any service-specific terms and conditions or terms of use) or services requested by you.
embed_text:
Which data protection rights do I have?


2.1 Provision of online services

We process your data in the necessary scope to fulfil contracts and to provide and execute further services requested by you, as described in this Privacy Notice. The purposes of the necessary data processing therefore depend on the purpose of the contract agreed with you (including our General Terms and Conditions and any service-specific terms and conditions or terms of use) or services requested by you. The most important purposes are:

- The provision of messages, reports, newsletters and other direct communication, insofar as these are an integral component of our contractual services or the services requested by you.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text:
The guarantee of the general security, operability and stability of our service including defence from attacks.
- Non-promotional communication with you on technical, security-related and contractually relevant subjects (e.g. fraud warnings or account blocking).
embed_text:
The most important purposes are:

- The provision of messages, reports, newsletters and other direct communication, insofar as these are an integral component of our contractual services or the services requested by you. The guarantee of the general security, operability and stability of our service including defence from attacks.
- Non-promotional communication with you on technical, security-related and contractually relevant subjects (e.g. fraud warnings or account blocking). Legal Basis:

Insofar as the purpose relates to the execution of a contract agreed with you or the provision of a service requested by you, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) b GDPR.

embed_text:

Insofar as the purpose relates to the execution of a contract agreed with you or the provision of a service requested by you, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) b GDPR. Otherwise, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) f GDPR, whereby we may use your personal data for the above purposes if we deem it necessary to do so for our legitimate interests.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text:

In order to combat the risk of data security breaches, data pertaining to users of our services is encrypted in transmission. This applies both to ordering and to registering for a customer account.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: To provide additional protection from external attacks, we rely on special security technologies which constantly check our systems and identify and report anomalies.
embed_text: Encryption prevents third parties from viewing the data. To provide additional protection from external attacks, we rely on special security technologies which constantly check our systems and identify and report anomalies. We also use technical and organisational measures to secure our systems against loss, destruction, unauthorised access or distribution of customer data by unauthorised persons.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: We also use technical and organisational measures to secure our systems against loss, destruction, unauthorised access or distribution of customer data by unauthorised persons.

In this manner we wish to keep the risk of unauthorised access as low as possible, because protecting your data is our top priority.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: We transmit and process your data where necessary for administrative and logistical processes and to optimise business processes within Zalando Group in order to design these in a more efficient and legally secure way and to fulfil our contractual and legal obligations (e.g. retention obligations under commercial and tax law).
embed_text: 2.3 Business management and business optimisation We transmit and process your data where necessary for administrative and logistical processes and to optimise business processes within Zalando Group in order to design these in a more efficient and legally secure way and to fulfil our contractual and legal obligations (e.g. retention obligations under commercial and tax law). Many systems and technologies are shared within Zalando Group.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: - Guaranteeing the security and operability of our IT systems.
embed_text:
- The prevention and clarification of criminal offences. - Guaranteeing the security and operability of our IT systems. Legal basis:

The legal basis for the processing of your data for business management and optimisation is Article 6 (1) f GDPR, whereby our legitimate interests are in the above purposes.

section: 2. What does Zalando use my data for?
text: Where we process your data on the basis of legal specifications, e.g. retention obligations and money laundering tests under tax law, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) c GDPR.

Legal basis:

The legal basis for the processing of your data for business management and optimisation is Article 6 (1) f GDPR, whereby our legitimate interests are in the above purposes. Where we process your data on the basis of legal specifications, e.g. retention obligations and money laundering tests under tax law, the legal basis is Article 6 (1) c GDPR. 2.4 On the basis of your consent

If you have given us your consent for the processing of personal data, your consent is the primary basis of our data processing.

Notices of withdrawal

You may not withdraw consent for data processing activities that are currently ongoing or have been initiated on the basis of your consent. If the relevant service supports this function, you can adjust and withdraw consent to receive newsletters and other notifications in the preference centre. You can find the link to the preference centre in each newsletter.

section: 3. Info on websites
text: The IP address it contains is anonymised immediately upon session termination, before any storage in log files takes place.
embed_text:
Device and Access Data

Whenever you access our services and databases, we collect device and access data and record it in so-called server log files. The IP address it contains is anonymised immediately upon session termination, before any storage in log files takes place. If it is available and activated on your device, we also collect a device-specific ID number (e.g. a so-called “promo ID” if you are using an Android device or an “ad ID” if you are using an Apple device).

section: 3. Info on websites
text: If you do not want this, you can deactivate it at any time in your device’s browser settings or system settings.
embed_text:
This device ID is issued by the manufacturer of your operating system and can be read by websites and apps and used to present content on the basis of your usage habits. If you do not want this, you can deactivate it at any time in your device’s browser settings or system settings. Login

We set up password-protected personal access for users who register for a customer account or another service.

section: 3. Info on websites
text:
Login

We set up password-protected personal access for users who register for a customer account or another service.
embed_text:
If you do not want this, you can deactivate it at any time in your device’s browser settings or system settings. Login

We set up password-protected personal access for users who register for a customer account or another service. If you do not log out again after logging in with your login details, most services automatically keep you logged in.

section: 5. Newsletter
text: When sending out our notifiable newsletters (such as the Zalando shop newsletter), we use the so-called double opt-in procedure or single opt-in procedure (country-dependent), i.e. we will only send you the newsletter if you have given explicit prior consent to us activating the newsletter.
embed_text: How do I register? When sending out our notifiable newsletters (such as the Zalando shop newsletter), we use the so-called double opt-in procedure or single opt-in procedure (country-dependent), i.e. we will only send you the newsletter if you have given explicit prior consent to us activating the newsletter. If a double opt-in is required in your country, you must also have confirmed that the email address you have shared with us belongs to you.

section: 5. Newsletter
text: If a double opt-in is required in your country, you must also have confirmed that the email address you have shared with us belongs to you.
embed_text: When sending out our notifiable newsletters (such as the Zalando shop newsletter), we use the so-called double opt-in procedure or single opt-in procedure (country-dependent), i.e. we will only send you the newsletter if you have given explicit prior consent to us activating the newsletter. If a double opt-in is required in your country, you must also have confirmed that the email address you have shared with us belongs to you. For this purpose we will send you a notification email and ask you to confirm by clicking on one of the links in this email that you are the owner of the email address you have shared with us.

section: 5. Newsletter
text: For this purpose we will send you a notification email and ask you to confirm by clicking on one of the links in this email that you are the owner of the email address you have shared with us.
embed_text: If a double opt-in is required in your country, you must also have confirmed that the email address you have shared with us belongs to you. We may waive this measure if you have already confirmed to us in this way for another purpose that you are the owner of this email address.

section: 5. Newsletter
text:
5.2 Unsubscribing

If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can withdraw your consent at any time without incurring any costs other than the transmission costs according to basic tariffs.
embed_text:
We may waive this measure if you have already confirmed to us in this way for another purpose that you are the owner of this email address. 5.2 Unsubscribing

If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can withdraw your consent at any time without incurring any costs other than the transmission costs according to basic tariffs. A signed written request sent by registered post to the Zalando company responsible for the relevant newsletter is required for this.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text:
Who is my data forwarded to?

Zalando only forwards your data if this is allowed by German or European law.
embed_text:
6. Who is my data forwarded to?

Zalando only forwards your data if this is allowed by German or European law. We work particularly closely with certain service providers, for example in the area of customer service (e.g. hotline service providers), with technical service providers (e.g. running computer centres).

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text: These service providers may generally only process your data on our behalf under special conditions.
embed_text: We work particularly closely with certain service providers, for example in the area of customer service (e.g. hotline service providers), with technical service providers (e.g. running computer centres). These service providers may generally only process your data on our behalf under special conditions. Where we use them to process orders, the service providers only receive access to your data in the scope and for the time period required for provision of the relevant service.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text: Where we use them to process orders, the service providers only receive access to your data in the scope and for the time period required for provision of the relevant service.
embed_text:
These service providers may generally only process your data on our behalf under special conditions. Where we use them to process orders, the service providers only receive access to your data in the scope and for the time period required for provision of the relevant service. 6.1 Zalando Group companies

Many systems and technologies are shared within the Zalando Group.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text: Therefore, companies within the Zalando Group which require access to your data to fulfil our contractual and legal obligations, or to fulfil their respective functions within the Zalando Group, receive this access.
embed_text:
This allows us to offer you a more economical, secure, unified and personalised service. Therefore, companies within the Zalando Group which require access to your data to fulfil our contractual and legal obligations, or to fulfil their respective functions within the Zalando Group, receive this access. Examples
When you contact Zalando customer service, your request is forwarded to Zalando Customer Care DACH SE & Co. KG or Zalando Customer Care International SE & Co.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text: In such cases, our service providers are independently responsible for ensuring appropriate data protection standards.
embed_text: If they process your data outside the European Union, this may mean that your data is transmitted to a country with a lower data protection standard than the European Union. In such cases, our service providers are independently responsible for ensuring appropriate data protection standards. Zalando does not take responsibility for the data protection measures applied by service providers processing your data outside the European Union.

section: 6. Who is my data forwarded to?
text:
6.3 Authorities and other third parties

If we are obliged by an official or court decision or it is for prosecution purposes, we will if necessary forward your data to prosecution authorities or other third parties.
embed_text:
Zalando does not take responsibility for the data protection measures applied by service providers processing your data outside the European Union. 6.3 Authorities and other third parties

If we are obliged by an official or court decision or it is for prosecution purposes, we will if necessary forward your data to prosecution authorities or other third parties. 7.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: You have the following legal data protection rights under the relevant legal conditions: Right to information (Article 15 GDPR), right to deletion (Article 17 GDPR), right to correction (Article 16 GDPR), right to restriction of processing (Article 18 GDPR), the right to object to particular data processing measures (Article 21 GDPR).
embed_text: Which data protection rights do I have? You have the following legal data protection rights under the relevant legal conditions: Right to information (Article 15 GDPR), right to deletion (Article 17 GDPR), right to correction (Article 16 GDPR), right to restriction of processing (Article 18 GDPR), the right to object to particular data processing measures (Article 21 GDPR). If you want to exercise your data protection rights you must submit a written request by registered post to our Data Protection Officer.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: If you want to exercise your data protection rights you must submit a written request by registered post to our Data Protection Officer.
embed_text: You have the following legal data protection rights under the relevant legal conditions: Right to information (Article 15 GDPR), right to deletion (Article 17 GDPR), right to correction (Article 16 GDPR), right to restriction of processing (Article 18 GDPR), the right to object to particular data processing measures (Article 21 GDPR). If you want to exercise your data protection rights you must submit a written request by registered post to our Data Protection Officer. We process all data protection rights requests within 14 days of receipt.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: We process all data protection rights requests within 14 days of receipt.
embed_text: If you want to exercise your data protection rights you must submit a written request by registered post to our Data Protection Officer. We process all data protection rights requests within 14 days of receipt. For more information see "10.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: In order to ensure that your data is not disclosed to third parties in the course of requests for information, please attach sufficient proof of identity to your request by email or post.
embed_text:
Important Information:

- In order to ensure that your data is not disclosed to third parties in the course of requests for information, please attach sufficient proof of identity to your request by email or post. Please note that information requests will only be fulfilled for your profile data as defined in section 1.1 of this Privacy Notice.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: - You can change most of your information yourself in your customer account.
embed_text:
It is generally sufficient for this if you send your request to us using the email address saved to your account. - You can change most of your information yourself in your customer account. For other cases please contact customer service.
-

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: You may, however, contact the data protection authority, which will then forward your complaint to the responsible authority.
embed_text: The responsibilities of the data protection authorities depend on the seat of the competent authorities. You may, however, contact the data protection authority, which will then forward your complaint to the responsible authority. The authority responsible for Zalando is the Berlin Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information, Alt-Moabit 59-61, 10555 Berlin, Germany.

section: 7. Which data protection rights do I have?
text: - If you have given consent for the processing of your data, you may withdraw it at any time.
embed_text: The authority responsible for Zalando is the Berlin Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information, Alt-Moabit 59-61, 10555 Berlin, Germany. - If you have given consent for the processing of your data, you may withdraw it at any time. Withdrawal has no effect on the admissibility of the processing of your data which took place before the withdrawal.

section: 8. When will my data be deleted?
text:
When will my data be deleted?

We will store your account data as long as is necessary for the purposes named in this Privacy Notice, especially for the fulfilment of our contractual and legal obligations.
embed_text:
8. When will my data be deleted?

We will store your account data as long as is necessary for the purposes named in this Privacy Notice, especially for the fulfilment of our contractual and legal obligations. We may also store your personal data for other purposes if or as long as the law allows us to store it for particular purposes, including for defence against legal claims.

section: 8. When will my data be deleted?
text: If you close your customer account, you must additionally submit a separate written deletion request to our Data Protection Officer within 14 days of account closure to initiate the deletion of your data.
embed_text: We may also store your personal data for other purposes if or as long as the law allows us to store it for particular purposes, including for defence against legal claims. If you close your customer account, you must additionally submit a separate written deletion request to our Data Protection Officer within 14 days of account closure to initiate the deletion of your data. If no such request is received, your data will be retained for a further 6 months.

section: 8. When will my data be deleted?
text: If data is blocked, restriction of access rights and other technical and organisational measures are used to ensure that only a few employees can access the relevant data.
embed_text: What Does Blocking Mean? If data is blocked, restriction of access rights and other technical and organisational measures are used to ensure that only a few employees can access the relevant data. These employees may also only use the blocked data for the above purposes (e.g. for submission to the tax office in the event of tax audit).

section: 9. How does Zalando protect my data?
text: We also use technical and organisational measures to secure our website and other systems against loss, destruction, access, change or dissemination by unauthorised persons.
embed_text: We do this using the coding system SSL (Secure Socket Layer). We also use technical and organisational measures to secure our website and other systems against loss, destruction, access, change or dissemination by unauthorised persons. In the event of a personal data breach, we will notify all affected users within 24 hours of becoming aware of the breach, irrespective of the risk level.

section: 10. Changes to this Privacy Notice and points of contact
text: You can reach out to our customer service department for general questions on privacy and in order to exercise your data protection rights by sending an email to datenschutz@zalando.de .
embed_text:
We therefore recommend that you re-read this Privacy Notice from time to time. You can reach out to our customer service department for general questions on privacy and in order to exercise your data protection rights by sending an email to datenschutz@zalando.de . In order to directly contact our Data Protection Officer, please send your inquiry to the following postal address indication that it is “for the attention of Data Protection Officer”:
